Snapshot — May 26, 2026
  S&P 500:     7,516.52   z +1.67
  10Y Yield:      4.481%  z +1.08
  WTI Oil:        92.87   z -0.23

INSIGHT
S&P 500 at 7,517 is pushing above its recent range — a move that only matters if it holds. 10Y yield at 4.48% is elevated relative to its rolling mean — starting to lean but not decisive. Oil at $93 is sitting near its 63-session mean — no signal from oil.

INVALIDATION
• SPX breaks above 7,629 or below 7,404
• 10Y moves beyond 4.68% or below 4.28%

Method: MacroEvidence pipeline · yfinance + FRED · 63-session rolling z-scores · not financial advice.
